description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display with a thin black bezel and a small notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The sides are metallic, featuring subtle buttons and speaker grills, while the back is not visible in these views. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium look and feel. The screen displays a colorful array of app icons, typical of an iOS interface, with a gradient wallpaper in the background. The overall design is minimalist and highly refined, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge touchscreen, metallic sides, and a colorful app-filled display. The design is minimalist and premium, with rounded corners and a thin bezel.
description_view_0: The phone is viewed from the bottom front, showing the charging port, speaker grills, and the full touchscreen with app icons.
description_view_1: The phone is seen from the left side, highlighting the slim metallic edge and side buttons.
description_view_2: The phone is viewed from the top front, displaying the notch, front-facing sensors, and the upper part of the screen.
description_view_3: The phone is seen from the right side, showing the metallic edge and additional side buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful iOS-style home screen with app icons arranged in a grid, a gradient wallpaper, and a status bar at the top. No notifications or widgets are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: A front-facing camera and sensors are located in the notch at the top center of the screen. No rear cameras are visible in these views.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible: two on the left edge (likely volume up/down) and one on the right edge (likely power/lock button). All are slim and rectangular.
